_comment: Manual mapping from today's Jot bullets to Task/Note pages. Conventions: (a) Task titles MUST be prefixed with 'ts '. (b) Area is decided by a human after sampling each Area's actual content — NOT by keyword match. (c) Only Areas with 상태=In-progress (group: Responsible / Occasional) are eligible. (d) ActDate defaults to the Jot date. (e) Rule: 1 checkbox = 1 Task; sub-bullets/sub-checkboxes UNDER a checkbox are NOT created as separate Tasks/Notes — they are embedded inside that Task's body (as bulleted_list_item blocks). The 'embed_children' list per task records which Jot block IDs were embedded.

tasks.title: ts 슬라이드 모두 합치기. 올인원 슬라이드 만들기.
ts 아내랑 아기랑 갈수있는 호텔 탐색
ts 태스크만들기: 데일리좃 보고 일정만드는거 (Area 자동, 체크박스 오른쪽 링크)
